meta.title: HELIX plan: turn aligned artifacts into bounded work

narration: The brief is written and aligned. Now turn it into bounded implementation work — beads the runtime can execute.

assistant: Reading PRD + feature specs to identify the work needed.
Decomposing into beads — scoped, with explicit acceptance and evidence expectations.

output:
bead-001  · CSV header sniffer · accepts: schema-mapping.yaml exists
            · evidence: tests/header_sniffer_test.go (3 fixtures)
  bead-002  · row-level validator · accepts: rejects malformed rows with diagnostic
            · evidence: tests/validator_test.go (10 cases incl. unicode)
  bead-003  · Parquet writer · accepts: round-trip equivalence on golden CSV
            · evidence: tests/parquet_test.go + benchmarks/throughput
  bead-004  · CLI surface · accepts: --help, --schema, --output flags documented
            · evidence: e2e test against fixture/sample.csv

assistant: Plan ordered by dependency. bead-001 unblocks bead-002 unblocks bead-003. bead-004 is independent.

narration: Four beads, deterministic acceptance criteria, evidence locked in. Any agent picking one up knows what done means.
